documentation:
## Aliyun ROS FNF Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as FNF from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-fnf';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.Flow.attr_created_time
documentation: Attribute CreatedTime: Flow creation time.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.Flow.attr_id
documentation: Attribute Id: The unique ID of the flow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.Flow.attr_last_modified_time
documentation: Attribute LastModifiedTime: The most recently modified time of the flow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.Flow.attr_name
documentation: Attribute Name: The name of the flow created.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FNF::Flow`, which is used to create a flow.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosFlow\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-fnf-flow>

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.FlowProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Flow`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-fnf-flow>

```
param definition

Property definition: The definition of the created flow following the FDL syntax standard.

param name

Property name: The name of the flow created. This name is unique under the account.

param description

Property description: Create a description of the flow.

param execution_mode

Property executionMode: The execution mode of the flow.

param external_storage_location

Property externalStorageLocation: The external storage location for the flow.

param request_id

Property requestId: The specified Request ID for this request. If not specified, our system will help you generate a random one.

param role_arn

Property roleArn: Optional parameter, the resource descriptor information required for the execution of the flow, used to perform the assume role during FnF execution.
```

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FNF::Flow`, which is used to create a flow.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Flow` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-fnf-flow>

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FNF::Schedule`, which is used to create a time-based schedule.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Schedule` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-fnf-schedule>

documentation:

param scope



param id



param props

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_create_time
documentation: Attribute CreateTime: The time when the flow was created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_definition
documentation:
Attribute Definition: The flow definition, which follows the flow definition language (FDL) syntax standard.

Considering compatibility, the system supports the two flow definition specifications.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_description
documentation: Attribute Description: The description of the flow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_flow_id
documentation: Attribute FlowId: The unique ID of the flow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_flow_name
documentation:
Attribute FlowName: The name of the flow.

The name must be unique within a region for the same Alibaba Cloud account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_last_modified_time
documentation: Attribute LastModifiedTime: The time when the flow was last modified.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_role_arn
documentation:
Attribute RoleArn: The Alibaba Cloud resource name (ARN) of the authorized role on which the execution of the flow relies.

During the execution of the flow, CloudFlow assumes the role to call API operations of relevant services.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.Flow.attr_type
documentation:
Attribute Type: The type of the flow.

Valid values are FDL or DEFAULT.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::FNF::Flow`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosFlow\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-fnf-flow>

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.FlowProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Flow`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-fnf-flow>

```
param flow_name

Property flowName: The name of the flow. The name must be unique within a region for the same Alibaba Cloud account.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.FlowProps.flow_name
documentation:
Property flowName: The name of the flow.

The name must be unique within a region for the same Alibaba Cloud account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.FlowProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

documentation: :Attribute: CreateTime: The time when the time-based schedule was created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.attr_cron_expression
documentation: :Attribute: CronExpression: The CRON expression of the time-based schedule to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.attr_description
documentation: :Attribute: Description: The description of the time-based schedule to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.attr_last_modified_time
documentation: :Attribute: LastModifiedTime: The time when the time-based schedule was last updated.

documentation: :Attribute: Payload: The trigger message of the time-based schedule to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.attr_schedule_id
documentation: :Attribute: ScheduleId: The ID of the time-based schedule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.attr_schedule_name
documentation: :Attribute: ScheduleName: The name of the time-based schedule to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.flow_name
documentation:
:Property:

flowName: The name of the flow that is associated with the time-based schedule. The name must be unique within the region and cannot be modified after the time-based schedule is created. The name must meet the following conventions:
The name can contain letters, digits, underscores (*), and hyphens (-).
The name must start with a letter or an underscore (*).
The name is case-sensitive.
The name must be 1 to 128 characters in length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.schedule_name
documentation:
:Property:

scheduleName: The name of the time-based schedule. The name must meet the following conventions:
The name can contain letters, digits, underscores (*), and hyphens (-).
The name must start with a letter or an underscore (*).
The name is case-sensitive.
The name must be 1 to 128 characters in length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.RosSchedule.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::FNF::Schedule`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Schedule` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-fnf-schedule>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::FNF::Schedules`, which is used to query time-based schedules.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosSchedules\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-fnf-schedules>

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.SchedulesProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Schedules`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-fnf-schedules>

```
param flow_name

Property flowName: The name of the flow that is bound to the time-based schedule. The name is unique within the region and cannot be modified after the time-based schedule is created. Valid values: The name can contain letters, digits, underscores (*), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter or an underscore (*). The name is case-sensitive. The name must be 1 to 128 characters in length.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.SchedulesProps.flow_name
documentation:
Property flowName: The name of the flow that is bound to the time-based schedule.

The name is unique within the region and cannot be modified after the time-based schedule is created. Valid values:
The name can contain letters, digits, underscores (*), and hyphens (-).
The name must start with a letter or an underscore (*).
The name is case-sensitive.
The name must be 1 to 128 characters in length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_fnf.datasource.SchedulesProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.
